visits.note: Patient presents with new onset hypertension and hyperlipidemia. Patient is started on lisinopril for hypertension and atorvastatin for hyperlipidemia. Patient reports no symptoms of diabetes but has a family history.

Patient returns with worsening hypertension and hyperlipidemia. BP is now 160/90. LDL is 200. Patient reports recent onset of edema. eGFR has decreased to 60. Patient is started on metformin for diabetes prevention.

Patient returns with worsening kidney function and hypertension. BP is now 170/95. eGFR is now 40. Patient reports recent onset of shortness of breath. Patient is started on ramipril for more aggressive blood pressure control.
